summary: Live-applied ADR 0328 on `codex/ws-0328-live-apply` by introducing explicit budgets for root summary surfaces, generating rollover ledgers for older release and status history, wiring that policy into release and validation automation, and verifying the result through focused tests, repository validation, remote validation, and a repaired pre-push gate replay while leaving the exact-main protected-surface replay for the final integration step.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_root_summary.py tests/test_generate_release_notes.py tests/test_generate_status_docs.py tests/test_release_manager.py tests/test_canonical_truth.py -q` returned `22 passed in 0.57s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-targeted-tests-r1-0.178.3.txt`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-docs generated-portals` passed after the workstream ownership adjustments and generated-surface refreshes, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-validate-repo-r5-0.178.3.txt`.

verification.check: Release-manager visibility and next-version dry run
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reported repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, this workstream still `in_progress` at the time of the snapshot, and separate pre-existing `controller_dependency_gap` waiver blockers through 2026-04-06, while the dry run showed `Next version: 0.178.4` and `Unreleased notes: 0`; both are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-release-status-r1.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-release-dry-run-r1-0.178.3.txt`.

`make remote-validate` passed on the remote builder with `agent-standards`, `workstream-surfaces`, `ansible-syntax`, `schema-validation`, `atlas-lint`, `policy-validation`, `iac-policy-scan`, `alert-rule-validation`, `type-check`, and `dependency-graph` all green, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-remote-validate-r1-0.178.3.txt`.

verification.check: Pre-push gate correction loop and final replay
verification.observed: The first `make pre-push-gate` run exposed an ADR 0208 dependency-direction violation because `platform/root_summary.py` imported `controller_automation_toolkit`; replacing that import with `platform.repo` helpers made `python3 scripts/validate_dependency_direction.py` pass and the second `make pre-push-gate` replay finish fully green, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-pre-push-gate-r1-0.178.3.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-dependency-direction-r1-0.178.3.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-pre-push-gate-r2-0.178.3.txt`.

notes: This is the branch-local live-apply receipt for a repo-only ADR, so it records the dedicated worktree replay and validation evidence without claiming an integrated repo version yet.
The exact-main replay still needs to refresh protected integration surfaces from the freshest `origin/main`, record the canonical mainline receipt, and merge the workstream to `main`.

Because ADR 0328 changes repository generation and validation behavior rather than live infrastructure state, `Implemented In Platform Version` remains `not applicable (repo-only)` and the platform version should stay `0.130.98` during this workstream.

correction_loop.repair_action: Replaced the `controller_automation_toolkit` import with `platform.repo` helpers after the first pre-push gate replay exposed the ADR 0208 dependency-direction violation.
